identity.title: Identity & commit ownership
identity.intro: Aexy attributes commits to whoever's logged in by matching your GitHub username. If commits from your account were synced before you signed in, they're attached to a placeholder developer record. Claim them here to merge those rows into your account so they show up in your insights and on leaderboards.
identity.noGithub: Connect a GitHub account in your developer settings before claiming commits.
identity.noneFound: Nothing to claim. Either your commits are already attributed to you, or no work has been synced yet under @{username}.

metrics.prs: {count, plural, one {# pull request} other {# pull requests}}

identity.explainer: Future syncs auto-merge on every login. This button is for older work synced before D2 shipped or after you change your GitHub username.

admin.title: Workspace ghost developers
admin.intro: Commits attributed to placeholder developers that touch your workspace's repos. Pick a target member to reattribute their work.
admin.adminOnlyHint: Admin only — workspace admins can manually link ghost activity to any workspace member.
admin.noGhosts: No ghost developers found in this workspace. All activity is attributed to real members.
admin.loading: Scanning workspace activity for ghost rows…
admin.confirmMerge: Merge {ghost} → {target}? All activity rows move and the ghost row is deleted.
